title: Marketing Executive | Tuas (Transport Provided) | Up to $2.8K
description:
• Basic up to $2,800 + $60 Mobile Allowance.

  • Up to 3 months Variable Bonus and $800 Annual Flexi Dollars.

  • Company bus provided from Tuas Crescent MRT at 08:00 AM.

  • 5-Day Work Week (Mon–Fri, 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM).

  • Comprehensive exposure to digital, social, and event marketing.

Job Summary

Horizon Automotive is looking for a creative and motivated Marketing Executive to join our Horizon Sales Department. You will be at the heart of our brand-building efforts, managing everything from viral social media content to high-impact events. This is an end-to-end role where you will plan, execute, and track the ROI of your own campaigns.

Responsibilities

  • Digital & Social Strategy: Formulate marketing plans across digital and offline platforms. Create engaging content (copy, photography, GIFs, and short videos) for all social channels.

  • Campaign Management: Oversee marketing projects from planning to reporting, ensuring a strong return on investment (ROI).

  • Social Media Community: Day-to-day management of social accounts, engaging with consumers, and promoting company initiatives.

  • Event Excellence: Conceptualize and execute events. Create detailed proposals covering timelines, budgets, and operations.

  • Market Intelligence: Research competitor trends and target customer analysis to help shape future value propositions.

  • Collaboration: Work closely with the Sales and Group Marketing teams to ensure brand alignment.

Requirements

  • Degree or Diploma in Marketing, Communications, or related fields (Fresh Graduates are encouraged to apply!).

  • Strong passion for social media and proficiency in artwork/video software like Canva and DaVinci.

  • Articulate with excellent presentation and communication skills.

  • Resourceful, motivated, and able to manage multiple project timelines simultaneously.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
